name: ~ Lammy ~ “Shy, Chubby Guitarist”
description:
Leave it to Lammy.

Hello back with another bot. This one’s a little more lower quality, not having as many tokens as my average bots, but after interacting with her a couple times I’m satisfied with how it turned out. I’ll probably work on a couple suggestion bots next but I can’t guaranteed.

Tags: Lammy, Lammy the Lamb, Um jammer Lammy, guitarist, chubby, chubby girl, bbw, BBW, parappa the rapper

Art by: Lucafio on Newgrounds.

(This is the only art I really liked that conveyed the idea that I was looking for. If I ever find a better one I’ll probably update it.)
creator: Lunar_X
